auth.phoneDescription: Enter your phone number to sign in or create your account
auth.hintSms: You will receive a verification code via SMS
auth.hintWhatsapp: You will receive a verification code on WhatsApp
auth.invalidPhone: Please enter a valid 10-digit phone number

home.upcomingPaliDesc: View upcoming Pali events and schedules
home.paliHistoryDesc: Explore the history of Pali events
home.noticeDesc: Stay updated with the latest notices and announcements
home.socialMediaDesc: View and share your social profiles
home.committeeDesc: View the committee members and their roles
home.applicationDesc: Apply for various services and events
home.pratihariSebaDesc: All Your Seba Details in One Place
home.aboutBody: Pratihari Nijog is one of the 36 Nijogs of Shri Jagannatha Temple, Puri. The Pratiharis serve as gatekeepers and door attendants of the Lord during daily rituals and festivals.
home.regBannerCompleteDesc: Submit your details to become an official member of Pratihari Nijog.
home.regBannerDraftDesc: Your registration is saved as a draft. Complete and submit it for approval.
home.regBannerSubmittedDesc: Your registration is under review by the Pratihari Nijog admin.
home.regBannerReviewDesc: An admin is reviewing your application. You will be notified shortly.
home.regBannerRejectedDesc: Your application was not approved. Check admin remarks and resubmit.
home.regBannerChangesDesc: The admin has requested changes to your registration. Please update and resubmit.
home.regBannerResubmittedDesc: Your updated application is awaiting review.
home.searchPlaceholder: Name, phone or health card no...
home.noSebayatsSub: Try a different name, phone, or health card number
home.typeToSearch: Type at least 2 characters to search
home.offlineAppsDesc: Applications require an internet connection. Please go online to continue.

schedule.title: My Upcoming Pali
schedule.subtitle: Your personal seba duty schedule
schedule.membersOnlyDesc: Your duty schedule is available after your membership is approved by the Pratihari Nijog admin.
schedule.noUpcomingDesc: You have no scheduled seba duties at this time.
schedule.tapToJump: Tap month/year to jump to a date
schedule.dutyDay: Duty day — tap to see details

profile.approvedDesc: Your registration has been approved. Welcome to Pratihari Nijog!
profile.underReviewDesc: An admin is reviewing your application.
profile.resubmittedDesc: Your updated application is awaiting review.

offlineSection.title: Offline Mode
offlineSection.enableHint: Cache your data for use without internet

paliHistory.title: Pali History
paliHistory.dutiesWillAppear: Your completed Pali duties will appear here.

notice.title: Notices
notice.noNoticesAll: Official announcements from Pratihari Nijog will appear here.

committee.title: Committee
committee.noMembers: No members have been added yet.
committee.noCommitteesDesc: Committee information will appear here once added by the administration.
committee.pageSubtitle: Pratihari Nijog is governed by an elected committee. Select a term to view members.

socialMedia.title: Social Media
socialMedia.noSocialDesc: You haven't added any social media links yet. Update your registration to add them.

application.title: My Applications
application.selectTypeDesc: Choose the type of application you want to submit
application.noAppTypesDesc: No application types are available at this time.
application.noApplicationsDesc: Tap the + button to submit a new application.
application.noProfile: No sebayat profile found. Please complete registration.
application.uploadHint: Upload any relevant documents or photos for this application.
application.uploadAtLeastOne: Please upload at least one supporting document.
application.fileUploadWebOnly: File upload is available on the web version.
application.noComments: No messages yet. Add a comment below.
application.offlineMessage: Applications require an internet connection. Please go online to submit or view applications.
